description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by blue, pink, and red highlights. The upper section displays a row of blue rectangular elements, possibly representing a heat sink or venting system, running parallel to a Picatinny-style rail. The grip is ergonomically shaped and decorated with blue and purple camo-like patterns, while the magazine or shell holder beneath the barrel is ribbed and colored in red and white. Warning symbols and a hexagonal emblem are visible on the side, adding to its high-tech, urban aesthetic. The barrel is cylindrical and capped with a blue ring, and the overall build is compact and robust, suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The trigger guard is squared and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger area.
description: A compact, futuristic black shotgun with blue, pink, and red accents, featuring a ribbed magazine, ergonomic grip, and prominent venting along the top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, blue venting, warning symbols, and the detailed grip and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening with a blue ring and the alignment of the top rail and venting.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same blue venting, grip, and magazine details, but with less visible warning symbols.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the shotgun, the squared trigger guard, and the alignment of the top rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing/venting along the top and a cylindrical barrel capped with a blue ring
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated, and substantial, providing full coverage around the trigger
